title: tillandsia schiedeana subsp. glabrior
intro: Tillandsia schiedeana subsp. glabrior, also known as an epiphytic bromeliad, is a type of air plant that belongs to the Tillandsia genus. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have wound-healing and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tillandsia schiedeana subsp. glabrior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against certain infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
